title: `BarrierGeometryAttestation` for mean-reversion primaries
source: [phase5/proposal.py](phase5/proposal.py) `BarrierGeometryAttestation.validate` — current rule refuses R:R<2.5 for trend primaries (`ema_cross`, `momentum_zscore`, `phase5_*`); mean-rev primaries (`bollinger_meanrev` and future) are unconstrained.
why: The Phase 1 lesson ([project_barrier_geometry_root_cause](C:/Users/LC/.claude/projects/d--PROJECTS-QuantHack/memory/project_barrier_geometry_root_cause.md)) was learned on trend primaries: with ~30% win rate, sl=1×ATR/tp=1.5×ATR is below break-even. Mean-reversion's expected win rate is structurally different (target ~55-60% on selective entries) so the R:R<2.5 floor is the wrong constraint — but *some* attestation should still exist to prevent the BULLS-v1 schema-revert bug from happening on `bollinger_meanrev`. Currently the validator just lets mean-rev proposals through.
value_rationale: M (mean-rev is the only viable H4 archetype per the regime dossier; this is upstream of any future H4 work)
scope: extend `BarrierGeometryAttestation.validate(primary_name)` with a `meanrev` branch that asserts win-rate-vs-R:R consistency. Add tests. Update the hypothesizer's [.claude/agents/phase5-hypothesizer.md](.claude/agents/phase5-hypothesizer.md) to surface the rule for mean-rev archetypes.

history.reason: Picked after B0032 ships — mean-rev primaries now run through the H4 audit path with no geometry guardrails. Same XS lever as B0036 was for orthogonality.

Added meanrev branch to BarrierGeometryAttestation.validate: 0.5 <= R:R <= 2.0 for bollinger_meanrev. Rationale: mean-rev win rate ~55-60% has break-even R:R in [0.67, 0.82]; R:R>2.0 = trend-in-disguise (winners running past the mean), R:R<0.5 needs >67% win rate (overfit territory). cusum_filter remains unconstrained (event-based). Also documented the per-archetype rule in .claude/agents/phase5-hypothesizer.md "Barrier geometry per archetype" section + added the missing barrier_geometry_attestation field to the output schema in the same file. Tests: tests/phase5/test_b0014_barrier_geometry_meanrev.py (11 tests covering trend regression, meanrev bounds at + below + above, cusum bypass, positivity guard). 539/539 tests pass.
feat(phase5): close 7 tickets â€” Loop A/H4 infra hardening + reporting
